# qt

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `qt`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `qt.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Qt 5 and 6 configuration. |
| `qt.kde.settings` | `attribute set of (KDE option value)` | A set of values to be modified by {command}`kwriteconfig6`. The example value would cause the following command to run in the activation script: `shell kwriteconfig6 --file $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/powermanagementprofilesrc \               --group AC \               --group HandleButtonEvents \               --group lidAction \               --key lidAction \               32` Note, `null` values will delete the corresponding entry instead of inserting any value. |
| `qt.kvantum.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kvantum configuration. |
| `qt.kvantum.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of section of a kvconfig file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them)` | Global configuration settings written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Kvantum/kvantum.kvconfig`. |
| `qt.kvantum.settings.Applications` | `attribute set of list of string` | Application configuration settings for Kvantum. Themes set here will override {option}`qt.kvantum.settings.General.theme` for their specific applications. |
| `qt.kvantum.settings.General` | `open submodule of section of a kvconfig file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them)` | General configuration settings for Kvantum. |
| `qt.kvantum.settings.General.theme` | `null or string` | The default Kvantum theme to use. |
| `qt.kvantum.themes` | `list of package` | Theme packages to install to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Kvantum/`. |
| `qt.platformTheme` | `null or one of "gtk", "gtk3", "gnome", "adwaita", "lxqt", "qtct", "kde", "kde6" or (submodule)` | Deprecated. Use {option}`qt.platformTheme.name` instead. |
| `qt.qt5ctSettings` | `null or (attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them))` | Qtct configuration. Writes settings to `qt5ct/qt5ct.conf` file. Lists will be translated to comma-separated strings. Fonts must be quoted (see example). |
| `qt.qt6ctSettings` | `null or (attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a non-empty list of them))` | Qtct configuration. Writes settings to `qt6ct/qt6ct.conf` file. Lists will be translated to comma-separated strings. Fonts must be quoted (see example). |
| `qt.style.name` | `null or string` | Style to use for Qt5/Qt6 applications. Case-insensitive. Some examples are `adwaita`, `adwaita-dark`, `adwaita-highcontrast`, `adwaita-highcontrastinverse` : Use the Adwaita style from [`adwaita-qt`](https://github.com/FedoraQt/adwaita-qt) `breeze` : Use the Breeze style from [`breeze`](https://github.com/KDE/breeze) `bb10bright`, `bb10dark`, `cde`, `cleanlooks`, `gtk2`, `motif`, `plastique` : Use styles from [`qtstyleplugins`](https://github.com/qt/qtstyleplugins) `kvantum` : Use styles from [`kvantum`](https://github.com/tsujan/Kvantum) |
| `qt.style.package` | `null or package or list of package` | Theme package to be used in Qt5/Qt6 applications. Auto-detected from {option}`qt.style.name` if possible. See its documentation for available options. |
